flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Virginia State University fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (31.3% → 24.3%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Virginia State University fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (47.8% → 39.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Virginia State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Virginia State University rose 31% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9k → 5.1k).
